text:
Created attachment 237694
diff to update devel/py-buildbot* from 3.5.0 to 3.6.1

Buildbot 3.6.1 was released.
Updated ports work for me and passed poudriere test on recent 13.1-STABLE

While here, update min python version to 3.7 that is minimal supported by upstream
